introSection: Seven Ring Suspended Looping Coaster (Chinese: 七环悬挂过山车) was an Inverted roller coaster located at Jinling Happy World in Jin'an, Lu'an, Anhui, China. It opened on 13 August 2012, making it the second roller coaster at Jinling Happy World. It was manufactured by Hebei Zhongye Metallurgical Equipment Manufacturing.
fullText: Seven Ring Suspended Looping Coaster (Chinese: 七环悬挂过山车) was an Inverted roller coaster located at Jinling Happy World in Jin'an, Lu'an, Anhui, China. It opened on 13 August 2012, making it the second roller coaster at Jinling Happy World. It was manufactured by Hebei Zhongye Metallurgical Equipment Manufacturing.
